channel.title: Alex Valuev — Senior AI Product Manager & Career Coach
channel.description: Alex Valuev — Senior AI Product Manager with 11+ years shipping AI and data products across healthcare, FinTech, and MedTech. Career coach to 100+ senior software engineers. Portfolio, public research, and contact.

item.title: About — Alex Valuev
item.description: Long-form professional bio: career history from 2014 to present, leadership philosophy, technical and domain expertise, and the principles behind low-ego coaching leadership.

item.title: Projects — public work by Alex Valuev
item.description: Public research and engineering projects, including the padel-market-analysis evidence-graded research portfolio, agent-factory multi-agent orchestration, and other open-source experiments.

item.title: Career Coaching for Senior Software Engineers — VALUEV CAREER
item.description: Career coaching for senior software engineers: resume rewriting, behavioural interview preparation, salary negotiation. 100+ engineers coached since 2022. Run through Telegram and YouTube.

item.title: Contact Alex Valuev
item.description: Email, LinkedIn, GitHub, Telegram, and YouTube channels. Available for senior product roles in AI healthcare and FinTech, and for one-on-one career coaching engagements.
